# PERF-132 negative: pass ctx as a goroutine parameter so the
# request lifetime cancels the work
lang: go
file: PERF-132-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(ctx context.Context, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	_ = r
	_ = db
	// Inline: no goroutine; the call propagates ctx directly.
	rows, _ := db.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id FROM users")
	_ = rows
}
